header.title: Dialog
header.subtitle: A modal overlay that blocks interaction with the background. Includes a focus trap, body scroll lock, accessible ARIA roles, and animated entry. Three sizes available.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: Dialog portals both the overlay and the container to document.body. The overlay captures clicks to dismiss; the container stops propagation.

parts.overlay: Full-screen backdrop with click-to-close. Animates in with nx-dialog-overlay-in.
parts.container: The white panel with role=dialog, aria-modal, aria-labelledby, aria-describedby.
parts.close: The × button in the top-right corner. Hidden with hideCloseButton=true.
parts.header: Title (h2) and description slot. aria-labelledby points here.
parts.body: children slot — place your content or form here.
parts.footer: No built-in footer slot. Compose your own with flex layout inside children.

basic.title: Basic example
basic.description: A dialog with title, description, body content, and a footer with a single close button.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Three max-width presets: sm (24rem), md (32rem, default), lg (42rem).

destructive.title: Destructive confirm
destructive.description: The pattern for irreversible actions. Cancel (ghost) on the left, destructive action on the right.

withForm.title: With form
withForm.description: Dialogs with focusable inputs demonstrate the focus trap — Tab cycles only within the dialog.

noCloseButton.title: Without close button
noCloseButton.description: Set hideCloseButton=true when the consumer controls dismissal exclusively through footer buttons.

keyboard.title: Keyboard navigation
keyboard.description: Full keyboard support is built in.

demos.basicDescription: This is a description for the dialog. It provides context below the title.
demos.basicBody: Place your content here. The dialog traps focus and prevents background scrolling while open.
demos.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently removed from our servers.
demos.formDescription: Update your name and bio. Tab between fields to test the focus trap.
demos.noCloseDescription: Please read and accept the terms to continue.
demos.noCloseBody: By using NexDash you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy. Your data will be handled in accordance with our privacy policy.

keyboard.tabDesc: Move focus to the next focusable element inside the dialog
keyboard.shiftTabDesc: Move focus to the previous focusable element
keyboard.escapeDesc: Close the dialog and return focus to the trigger

props.open: Controls whether the dialog is visible.
props.onClose: Called when the dialog should close (backdrop click, Escape key, or close button).
props.title: Heading text rendered in the dialog header with role=heading.
props.description: Secondary text displayed below the title.
props.size: Controls the max-width of the dialog panel.
props.closeLabel: Accessible label for the × close button. Pass a translated string from the consumer.
props.initialFocusRef: Ref to the element that should receive focus when the dialog opens. Defaults to the first focusable element.
props.hideCloseButton: Hides the × button. The consumer is responsible for providing a close action in the footer.
props.className: Additional classes applied to the dialog panel.
props.extendsNote: Dialog renders in a portal attached to document.body. children are placed after the header with no implicit wrapper.
